chunks.content:
Article: What if Shinji was a badass or pretended to be 
[]: What if Shinji was a badass ( or pretended to be )             Quote Post by mastervampire » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:26 am The whole series its like Shinji is too scared or indimidated of his father, but im wondering what would Shinji of been like if he acted different? Like maybe on their first meeting if he was wearing some other clothes like black jacket, jeans, spiked hair etc.. with an upbeat attitude "omg i get to actually use this robot thing? awesome thx dad!' seemed like his father just walked all over him because he could, i would of loved to see his reaction if it was different

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:41 am http://www.minaidehazukashii.com/uploads/258/eva_comic.jpg Eva would be exactly like this.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:42 am Then he would have wallpapers like this filling the intertubes with its awe inspiring presence:

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:43 am ^That is like... Episode 26 Shinji, isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:49 am Zaiku wrote: ^That is like... Episode 26 Shinji, isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:52 am I meant the attitude, he looks confident and... Unusually badass. >_> Not that episode 26 Shinji is, but he still is to a much higher degree than the Shinji we all know and love. Well, not all of love him but whatever.

[]: Re: What if Shinji was a badass ( or pretended to be )             Quote Post by pat457 » Mon Sep 15, 2008 3:52 am Ah, Shinji teh Uber-Evil/Badass. Brings back fond memories to me, that one. (searches for Uber-Evil Shinji pic conjured a while ago on a different thread)

Article: What if Shinji was a badass or pretended to be 
 (Japanese) fanfic about Shinji the war veteran, Shinji the genius, and Shinji the boy who'll have sex with women (even his own mother; he actually brought Yui back early on by...erm, 'having relations with' her while inside EVA-01) and induct them into his circle of 'friends'. All in the age of 14.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Tue Sep 16, 2008 6:20 am ^Sounds more like a story about Chuck Norris to me. Well, except for that having sex with his mother bit. Chuck Norris is above that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 16, 2008 11:44 am I forgot Ornette's image archive is down, otherwise the link would work. Anyway, if Shinji were a badass then he wouldn't be Shinji. Or he'd be Super Robot Wars Alpha Shinji, either way works. ^^;
